produced_in_session: New chat — guilt Session B v4.1 startup
blocking_reason: Two confirmed verse contamination issues (H2603B, H5387B) make verse reading of those terms analytically invalid. Op 5 decision now resolved. Ops 1-4 and 6-8 are executable immediately. Full reexport required before Session B analysis proceeds on clean data.

data_integrity_flags.observed: 72 verse records assigned to H2603B (term_inv_id=2574) in verse_term_links. Occurrence count for H2603B is 1.
data_integrity_flags.expected: H2603B should have at most 1 verse record. All 72 records show target words consistent with H2603A (cha.nan: be gracious) — 'graciously given', 'graciously', 'begged', etc.
data_integrity_flags.evidence: verse_ids 75701-75772 assigned to term_inv_id=2574. Sample: Gen 33:5 target='graciously given', Gen 33:11 target='graciously', Gen 42:21 target='begged'. Correct owner is H2603A (term_inv_id=2566).
data_integrity_flags.patch_action: Reassign all 72 verse_term_link records from term_inv_id=2574 (H2603B) to term_inv_id=2566 (H2603A), then locate and assign the single correct verse for H2603B if present in verse table.

data_integrity_flags.observed: 116 verse records assigned to H5387B (term_inv_id=2612) in verse_term_links. Occurrence count for H5387B is 4.
data_integrity_flags.expected: H5387B should have at most 4 verse records. All sampled records show target words consistent with H5387A (na.si: leader/prince) — 'princes', 'prince', etc.
data_integrity_flags.evidence: verse_ids 77439-77554 (116 records) assigned to term_inv_id=2612. Sample: Gen 17:20 target='princes', Gen 23:6 target='prince', Gen 25:16 target='princes'. Correct owner is H5387A (term_inv_id=2607).
data_integrity_flags.patch_action: Reassign all 116 verse_term_link records from term_inv_id=2612 (H5387B) to term_inv_id=2607 (H5387A), then locate and assign the 4 correct verses for H5387B (mist sense) if present in verse table.

data_integrity_flags.term: G1777 (enochos: liable for) and G2631 (katakrima: condemnation)
data_integrity_flags.observed: Both terms have delete_flagged=1 in wa_term_inventory but MTI status=extracted. G1777 has 8 verse records including the Sermon on the Mount (Mat 5:21-22); G2631 has 3 verses including Rom 5:16-18.
data_integrity_flags.expected: Terms marked delete_flagged=1 should either (a) have MTI status=delete and no verses, or (b) have delete_flagged=0 if they are genuinely extracted. The current state is contradictory: extracted in MTI but deleted in the term table.
data_integrity_flags.evidence: G1777 id=293 delete_flagged=1 | MTI status=extracted. G2631 id=294 delete_flagged=1 | MTI status=extracted. Both have verse records and PH2/quality flags indicating active analytical status.
data_integrity_flags.blocking: PARTIAL — these terms have verses and analytical flags; their current state is ambiguous. Analysis can note the ambiguity but cannot confidently include or exclude them.
data_integrity_flags.patch_action: DECISION REQUIRED: Leroux to confirm whether G1777 (enochos: liable for, Mat 5:21-22, Heb 2:15) and G2631 (katakrima: condemnation, Rom 5:16-18) are in scope for guilt registry. If yes: set delete_flagged=0 on both terms. If no: confirm delete_flagged=1 is correct and update MTI status to delete for both.

data_integrity_flags.observed: G0264 (occ=241, verses=37, coverage=15%) and G0265 (occ=26, verses=4, coverage=15%) are below the 20% threshold per §12.1 Check 3, but neither carries a HIGH_FREQUENCY_ANCHOR quality flag. G0266 (occ=586, verses=112, coverage=19%) correctly carries the flag.
data_integrity_flags.expected: Any term with coverage below 20% should carry HIGH_FREQUENCY_ANCHOR to signal that the verse set is a thin sample and synthesis-level conclusions are restricted.
data_integrity_flags.evidence: G0264 id=2580 quality_flags=NO_WORD_ANALYSIS, PROSE_ONLY_MEANING only. G0265 id=2581 quality_flags=NO_WORD_ANALYSIS, PROSE_ONLY_MEANING, SMALL_VERSE_SAMPLE only.
data_integrity_flags.blocking: NO — non-blocking. Analysis proceeds with PH2 flag noting the thin coverage.
data_integrity_flags.patch_action: Add HIGH_FREQUENCY_ANCHOR quality flag to G0264 (term_inv_id=2580) and G0265 (term_inv_id=2581) with detail noting coverage ratio.

data_integrity_flags.observed: 7 verse records for G0266 have empty term_links arrays and null target_word. Verse IDs: 3364-3370 (Heb 9:26, Heb 12:1, 1Jn 1:7, 1Jn 1:8, 1Jn 3:4, 1Jn 3:8, 1Jn 5:17). These account for the discrepancy between stats.verse_count (2444) and stats.verse_term_link_count (2426) along with the 11 empty-link records on G1777.
data_integrity_flags.expected: Each verse record should have at least one entry in the term_links array identifying the Strong's number and target word. Verses without term_links cannot be analytically attributed.
data_integrity_flags.blocking: NO — non-blocking. The verse texts are present and readable; only the span-match linkage metadata is missing. Analysis can proceed on the verse text.
data_integrity_flags.patch_action: Investigate and populate missing term_links entries for verse_ids 3364-3370. These are all NT epistolary uses of hamartia — the target_word field should be resolvable from the verse text and Strong's concordance.

operations.action: UPDATE verse_term_links SET term_inv_id = 2566 WHERE term_inv_id = 2574. This reassigns all 72 contaminated verse records from H2603B (cha.nan: be loathsome, id=2574) to H2603A (cha.nan: be gracious, id=2566).
operations.rationale: DIF-073-001. All 72 records assigned to H2603B carry H2603A semantic content (grace, graciousness, petition). The correct term for these verses is H2603A.
operations.verify: After operation: H2603B (term_inv_id=2574) has 0 verse_term_link records. H2603A (term_inv_id=2566) verse count increases by 72 (from ~72 to ~144 — confirm against full verse table). Note: this may mean H2603A now has duplicate verse references that need deduplication.

operations.action: After op_id=1: search verse table for the single occurrence of H2603B (cha.nan in its 'be loathsome' sense, Strongs H2603 secondary meaning). If located, create a verse_term_link record assigning it to term_inv_id=2574. If not located in the current verse table, add NO_VERSES quality flag to H2603B.
operations.rationale: H2603B has occ=1. The correct verse for the 'be loathsome' sense must be identified and assigned, or the term confirmed as having no verse record in this export.
operations.verify: H2603B (term_inv_id=2574) has exactly 0 or 1 verse records after this operation. If 0, NO_VERSES flag is present.

operations.action: UPDATE verse_term_links SET term_inv_id = 2607 WHERE term_inv_id = 2612. This reassigns all 116 contaminated verse records from H5387B (na.si: mist, id=2612) to H5387A (na.si: leader/prince, id=2607).
operations.rationale: DIF-073-002. All 116 records assigned to H5387B carry H5387A semantic content (prince, leader, chief). The correct term for these verses is H5387A.
operations.verify: After operation: H5387B (term_inv_id=2612) has 0 verse_term_link records. H5387A (term_inv_id=2607) verse count increases (confirm deduplication if needed).

operations.action: After op_id=3: search verse table for the 4 occurrences of H5387B (na.si in its 'mist' or 'vapour' sense). If located, create verse_term_link records assigning them to term_inv_id=2612. If not located, add NO_VERSES quality flag to H5387B.
operations.rationale: H5387B has occ=4. The correct verses for the 'mist/vapour' sense must be identified and assigned.
operations.verify: H5387B (term_inv_id=2612) has 0 or up to 4 verse records after this operation.

operations.action: UPDATE wa_term_inventory SET delete_flagged = 0 WHERE id IN (293, 294). Decision: G1777 (enochos: liable for) and G2631 (katakrima: condemnation) are IN SCOPE for guilt registry Session B analysis. Leroux confirmed 2026-03-25.
operations.rationale: DIF-073-003 resolved. G2631 appears in Rom 5:16, 5:18, and 8:1 — the guilt anchor verse. Its three occurrences span the condemnation-to-no-condemnation transformation that is the structural core of the NT guilt resolution. G1777 appears in Mat 5:21-22 (liability-for-judgment in the Sermon on the Mount), Mar 3:29 (eternal guilt), 1Cor 11:27 (guilty of the body and blood of the Lord), and Jam 2:10 (guilty of the whole law). Both are analytically essential. In scope confirmed by Leroux.
operations.verify: G1777 (id=293) and G2631 (id=294) both have delete_flagged=0. Both appear in the re-exported term inventory as active terms.

operations.action: INSERT quality flag HIGH_FREQUENCY_ANCHOR for G0264 (term_inv_id=2580): flag_group='DATA_COVERAGE', description='High-frequency term: 241 occurrences. Verse sample (37 verses) represents 15% of occurrences — below programme 20% threshold.', detail='Coverage ratio 15% triggers VOLUME_LIMITATION PH2 flag requirement at Session B analysis stage.'
operations.rationale: DIF-073-004. G0264 has 15% coverage and no HF flag. Programme standard requires HF_ANCHOR flag on sub-20% coverage terms.

operations.action: INSERT quality flag HIGH_FREQUENCY_ANCHOR for G0265 (term_inv_id=2581): flag_group='DATA_COVERAGE', description='High-frequency term: 26 occurrences. Verse sample (4 verses) represents 15% of occurrences — below programme 20% threshold.', detail='Coverage ratio 15% triggers VOLUME_LIMITATION PH2 flag requirement at Session B analysis stage.'
operations.rationale: DIF-073-004. G0265 has 15% coverage and no HF flag.

reexport_note: After ops 1-4 and 6-8 are applied (op 5 pending decision): re-export guilt_73_full_[date].json. Corrected export should show: H2603B verses=0 or 1; H5387B verses=0 or up to 4; H2603A and H5387A verse counts increased accordingly; G0264 and G0265 carrying HIGH_FREQUENCY_ANCHOR flags; G0266 7 previously empty verse term_links populated. Re-run Session B v4.1 Data Integrity Check on corrected export before proceeding to analysis.

programme_notes.raised_by: Session B v4.1 pre-analysis — Leroux confirmed 2026-03-25
programme_notes.basis: G2631 katakrima (condemnation, occ=3) and its root family — katakrino (to condemn, G2632, occ not yet assessed), katakrisis (condemnation), akatakritos (uncondemned), autokatakritos (self-condemned) — constitute a distinct inner-being vocabulary cluster addressing the judicial-moral state of being under condemnation. This is analytically distinct from guilt (the moral fact of wrongdoing) and from shame (the relational/exposure experience). Condemnation is the verdict-state: the declared standing of one who is guilty before a judicial authority. The structural polarity guilt/condemnation vs. justification/no-condemnation is the explicit framework of Romans 5-8 and is signalled by the guilt anchor verse (Rom 8:1). G2632 katakrinō alone has sufficient occurrences to warrant a full registry.
programme_notes.action_required: Claude Code to check if condemnation is already registered in word_registry table. If not: create new registry entry for condemnation with anchor verse Rom 8:1 (shared with guilt, which is appropriate — the verse addresses both the fact of guilt and the verdict of condemnation). If already registered: confirm registry number and link to guilt registry via cross_registry_links.
